Our team is committed to making SeaSketc: Ua tautino atu la matou 'au e fa'afaigofie le avanoa o le SeaSketch mo tagata fa'aoga uma, e aofia ai ma i latou e iai mana'oga fa'apitoa. Matou te taumafai e mulimuli i Taiala mo le Avanoa i Mataupu i luga o le Upega Tafa'ilagi (WCAG) ina ia mautinoa se poto masani e aunoa ma se fa'alavelave, aemaise lava i le fa'aogaina o le keyboard ma le faigofie ona fa'aaogaina. E ui o lo'o matou galulue pea e fa'aleleia atili le avanoa, matou te taliaina ni manatu mai a matou tagata fa'aoga. Afai e te feagai ma ni fa'afitauli pe iai ni au fautuaga, fa'amolemole fa'afeso'ota'i matou i le <2>accessibility@seasketch.org</2>.
We conducted a comprehensive review of t: Na matou faia se iloiloga atoatoa o le SeaSketch interface e faʻaleleia atili ai le faigofie ona maua. Ua mafai nei e tagata faʻaoga ona faʻatautaia atoatoa ia basemaps, overlay layers, ma forums talanoaga e faʻaaoga ai naʻo le keyboard input. E le gata i lea, ua matou faʻatinoina le tele o uiga ARIA e faʻaleleia atili ai le fetaui ma screen readers ma isi tekinolosi fesoasoani, ma faʻamautinoa ai se poto masani e sili atu ona aofia ai tagata faʻaoga uma.
